_doc: THROWAWAY ground-truth spec (Phase-4, ckpt 155 — the freeroam SWORD/ATTACK arc). Resolves the OPEN QUESTIONS in plans/freeroam-sword-system.md: (1) does Z (ring id 0x24=36, the confirm/advance key) toggle the sword in freeroam? watch body+0x66 (sword-out timer/flag) + weapon(+0x750)+0x466 (sword-capable/drawn) + weapon+0x140 (stance mode); (2) X (ring id 9) with sword out → cmd4 (entity+0x14864)=0xf + a new body FSM state (body+0x38). Leader chain to Arche's ENTITY = [room_state 0x2784=10116, leader-slot 0x200c=8204, entity 0x9f4=2548] (same as pose_consts_fields.json); body = *(entity+0x40), weapon = *(entity+0x750), ring head = *(entity+0xc). Hook FUN_005b8fc0 (once/Flip). ring_head reads the most-recent ring record's id (off 0) — see 0x24/9 land when injected. Drive: pose-nav prefix (advances dialogue to tick 1837) then inject Z(36)/X(9) at freeroam ticks 1900-2090; read fields per tick. RUN: frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/sword/sword-nav.jsonl --held-trace runs/sword/sword-held.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/sword_fields.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --call-trace-frames <freeroam frames> --run-dir runs/sword/cap.

0x5b8fc0.name: arche_sword
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 Flip (once/frame). Leader-chain to Arche's ENTITY (code 0xc35a); reads the sword-toggle + attack-command fields off the entity / body / weapon to pin Z's effect and X's attack.

fields.name: code
fields.reason: entity+0x1d4 actor code; 0xc35a == Arche (sanity)

fields.name: wx
fields.reason: body+4 worldX — DID she actually MOVE? (USER: retail didn't move = inputs maybe not applied)

fields.name: hvel
fields.reason: body+0x28 horizontal vel — nonzero = walk applied

fields.name: ring_head
fields.reason: *(entity+0xc) head ring record, +0 = id of the most-recent press (see 0x24 Z / 9 X land)

fields.name: ring_flag
fields.reason: head ring record +8 = flag (1=down-edge)

fields.name: cmd0
fields.reason: entity+0x14854 cmd[0] walk/dash (context)

fields.name: cmd4
fields.reason: entity+0x14864 cmd[4] ATTACK (0xe auto / 0xf X-press) — THE attack command

fields.name: cmd5
fields.reason: entity+0x14868 cmd[5] — the +0x14874 CONTEXT-ACTION queue target (479de0); the DRAW command lands here if id-9 reaches 478ba0:473

fields.name: cmd5_type
fields.reason: entity+0x14870 = the cmd[5] type (0xd2 when the context-action queued)

fields.name: wpn_d4
fields.reason: weapon+0xd4 — the +0x14874 match key (478ba0:475); determines which context-action fires

fields.name: atk94
fields.reason: entity+0x14894 attack/combo gate (478ba0:435/472)

fields.name: stance98
fields.reason: entity+0x14898 stance-arm mode (1 enables 0x18-0x1c selects; forced 2 for Arche when weapon+0x466==0)

fields.name: body_66_68
fields.reason: body+0x66 (low16) = SWORD-OUT timer/flag (478ba0:301 gate; 442a70:2206 decrements) + body+0x68 (high16) = mid-swing — THE Z-toggle target

fields.name: body_38
fields.reason: body+0x38 FSM main|sub<<16 — the attack body state on X

fields.name: body_3a3c
fields.reason: body+0x3a sub-phase (low16) + body+0x3c timer (high16) — anim FSM

fields.name: body_2c
fields.reason: body+0x2c facing (1 left / 3 right) — context

fields.name: wpn_140
fields.reason: weapon+0x140 stance mode (0479d30 get / 0479da0 set; watch on Z)

fields.name: wpn_466
fields.reason: weapon+0x466 (low16) sword-capable/drawn gate (478ba0:337 forces stance mode; watch on Z)

fields.name: wpn_44a
fields.reason: weapon+0x44a (478ba0:69) — entity-clear gate; context

fields.name: cmd2
fields.reason: entity+0x1485c cmd[2] JUMP — id-7 CONTROL: if this becomes 7, ring injection delivers

fields.name: arr0
fields.reason: entity+0x14874[0] match target (478ba0:475) vs weapon+0xd4

fields.name: arr0c
fields.reason: entity+0x14878[0] the queued command if matched
